title: 创建启用来宾状态隔离的机密虚拟机(GuestStateIsolationType)
title_en: Create a Confidential VM with Guest State Isolation Enabled (GuestStateIsolationType)
code:
# 来宾状态隔离(TrustedLaunch/VBS/SEV-SNP/TDX)。在 DefineSystem 建机时一次性设置两个属性。
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_gi'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$vssd.SecureBootEnabled=$true             # TrustedLaunch 要求安全启动
$vssd.GuestStateIsolationEnabled=$true    # 使能标志。缺此项时 Type 读回恒为 0
$vssd.GuestStateIsolationType=[uint16]0   # 0=TrustedLaunch 1=VBS 2=SEV-SNP 3=TDX 16=OpenHCL (Disabled=-1)
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)  # rv=0 表示成功
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$sd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
# 读回：GuestStateIsolationEnabled=True，GuestStateIsolationType=0/1 持久化成功
code_en:
# Guest state isolation (TrustedLaunch/VBS/SEV-SNP/TDX). Set both properties in a single pass at DefineSystem time.
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_gi'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$vssd.SecureBootEnabled=$true             # TrustedLaunch requires secure boot
$vssd.GuestStateIsolationEnabled=$true    # Enable flag. Without it, Type always reads back as 0
$vssd.GuestStateIsolationType=[uint16]0   # 0=TrustedLaunch 1=VBS 2=SEV-SNP 3=TDX 16=OpenHCL (Disabled=-1)
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)  # rv=0 indicates success
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$sd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
# Readback: GuestStateIsolationEnabled=True, GuestStateIsolationType=0/1 persisted successfully
output:
CREATED: WMITEST_guest_isolation
DEFAULT GuestStateIsolationType = 0
TRY Trusted Launch (=0) rv=0 readback=0 ok=True err=
TRY SEV-SNP (=2) rv=0 readback=0 ok=False err=
TRY TDX (=3) rv=0 readback=0 ok=False err=
TRY RME (=4) rv=0 readback=0 ok=False err=
TRY OpenHCL (=16) rv=0 readback=0 ok=False err=
ASSERT: UNSUPPORTED - property present but no isolation type accepted/persisted on this host (no SEV-SNP/TDX hardware)
STATUS=UNSUPPORTED
CLEANUP: OK no residue
notes: 须同时写入 GuestStateIsolationEnabled=$true 与 GuestStateIsolationType，且在 DefineSystem 建机时一次性下发(非事后 ModifySystemSettings)。缺少 GuestStateIsolationEnabled 时，GuestStateIsolationType 读回恒为 0。
TrustedLaunch(0) 要求启用安全启动(SecureBootEnabled=$true)。TrustedLaunch(0) 与 VBS(1) 在软件层即可持久化。
SEV-SNP(2) 与 TDX(3) 需要对应的 CPU 硬件(SEV-SNP CPU / TDX CPU)。在无相应硬件的宿主上，这些隔离类型无法被接受或持久化。对 SNP/TDX/VBS，创建流程通常还需附带 ConfigureTpm，并移除合成显卡、键鼠等设备。
notes_en: Both GuestStateIsolationEnabled=$true and GuestStateIsolationType must be written, and they must be supplied in a single pass at DefineSystem time (not via a subsequent ModifySystemSettings). When GuestStateIsolationEnabled is absent, GuestStateIsolationType always reads back as 0.
ValueMap: Disabled=-1, TrustedLaunch=0, VBS=1, SEV-SNP=2, TDX=3, OpenHCL=16.
TrustedLaunch(0) requires secure boot to be enabled (SecureBootEnabled=$true). TrustedLaunch(0) and VBS(1) can be persisted purely at the software layer.

SEV-SNP(2) and TDX(3) require the corresponding CPU hardware (SEV-SNP CPU / TDX CPU). On a host without the corresponding hardware, these isolation types cannot be accepted or persisted. For SNP/TDX/VBS, the creation flow typically also requires ConfigureTpm and the removal of devices such as the synthetic display adapter and keyboard/mouse.
